title: Pedilonum euphues
taxonomy: Pedilonum euphues is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to China and is commonly known as the Chinese starburst. The classification of Pedilonum euphues is further supported by its membership in the tribe Rubieae. The species is known for its unique and showy flowers, which are a characteristic feature of the Rubiaceae family. Pedilonum euphues is typically found in mountainous regions and is often cultivated for its ornamental value.
